song.title: Come and Rejoice With Me
song.author: Tim Miller
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C
song.lyrics: [v1] . C F C G 1) Come and rejoice with me Come and rejoice . C F C G Lift up your voice now and come and rejoice .Am G C G In my distress I called out to the Lord .Am G C G He answered me and delivered my soul|| .Am Em F G C From lying lips And from a tongue of deceit I’m free! .Dm C Can I enough rejoice? . F G7 C So come, come rejoice! Rejoice with me! [v2] 2) Come and rejoice with me Come and rejoice Lift up your voice with me Come and rejoice No more a sojourner in vanity No more a wanderer religiously|| We’ve been brought back to Christ And His economy Can we enough rejoice? So come, come rejoice! Rejoice with me! [C] . C G Am Em Chorus Let us go up unto To the house of the Lord our God . F C Dm G And let us give thanks to His Name|| . C G Am Em Our feet are now within Your gates, O Jerusalem . F Em We’re standing, we’re thanking . F G We’re praying, we’re praising . C G C G Yes! Praise ye the Lord! Praise ye the Lord! [v3] 3) Come and rejoice with me Come and rejoice Lift up your voice now and come and rejoice Our eyes are lifted up unto the hills The Lord, our Keeper, for all that He wills|| No one can snatch us out From now to eternity Can we enough rejoice? So come! Come rejoice! Rejoice with me!
